entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to Aspergillus flavus infection.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Water deficit imposed during late stages of pod maturation to evaluate seed infection.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes seed infection in peanuts.

entities.name: SEED INFECTION
entities.description: The extent of infection by Aspergillus flavus in peanut seeds.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The genetic ability of peanut genotypes to resist infection by A. flavus.

entities.name: LINE-SOURCE SPRINKLER IRRIGATION SYSTEM
entities.description: An irrigation system used to create a drought-stress gradient for screening.

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating peanut genotypes for resistance to A. flavus under field conditions.

entities.name: POD MATURATION
entities.description: The developmental stage of the peanut crop during which drought stress is applied.

entities.name: POSTRAINY SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal timing of the irrigated peanut crop growth.
